case_title: ISAAC'S MARKET VS. DAVID S. RODRIGUES

docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ISAAC'S MARKET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ISAAC MUHAWIEH--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ISAAC'S MARKET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUES, DAVID S. $744.18 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $809.18 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
